repo_prior_art.cite: none; the in-catalogue Stat entries concern policy-regret and dose-response frontiers, not two-period transition-composed g-formula RMSE.

published_prior_art.cite: RobinsLiTchetgenVanderVaart2008/RobinsLiMukherjeeTchetgenVanderVaart2017 give general HOIF methods, LuedtkeSofryginVanderLaanCarone2017 gives first-order longitudinal SDR, and RobinsLiTchetgenVanderVaart2016 says its HOIF results apply to time-dependent treatment but does not give this transition-smooth matched frontier.

RobinsTchetgenLiVanderVaart2009 establishes two-convex-mixture lower bounds for multiparameter semiparametric functionals, but not a normalized transition-kernel longitudinal mixture with the proposed composed target.

LuedtkeSofryginVanderLaanCarone2017 analyzes first-order sequential remainders and RobinsLiMukherjeeTchetgenVanderVaart2017 develops general higher-order equations, neither specifying minimal correction orders for recursively estimated longitudinal pseudo-outcomes.
RobinsLiTchetgenVanderVaart2008 supplies the single-time HOIF slow-rate benchmark recovered after removing the first-stage transition channel.

novelty_flags.label: oeq:frontier
novelty_flags.one_line: The survey omits closer HOIF/minimax candidates—especially RobinsLiTchetgenVanderVaart2016, which explicitly treats time-dependent treatments with time-varying confounding, and KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024, which gives a causal HOIF minimax elbow and fuzzy-hypothesis converse.

soundness_flags.label: def:chained-fuzzy-hypothesis-handle / oeq:chained-converse
soundness_flags.one_line: The displayed sign-paired family does not define the two mixtures or their full observed laws, and its shared signs in g^lambda and m_2^lambda cancel in the composed integral, so no stated tuning currently yields a lambda-separated psi.

soundness_flags.label: oeq:correction-architecture
soundness_flags.one_line: Neither the mixed cross-period remainder nor the membership predicate/order relation defining the claimed minimal set Q is specified, so “minimal correction-order set” is not yet a mathematical target.

soundness_flags.label: ass:state-sufficiency-outcome / ass:state-sufficiency-treatment / ass:transition-holder
soundness_flags.one_line: Exact Markov sufficiency and conditional-TV Hölder transition smoothness are load-bearing but their clinical-RL prose is generic and supplies no validated state construction or setting showing these strong restrictions plausibly hold.

soundness_flags.label: ass:independent-transition
soundness_flags.one_line: Gottesman2019 is a healthcare-RL guidance article, not support for the named state-independent-transition condition; moreover its bibliography entry combines the author list of a different Gottesman et al. paper with the Guidelines title.

accepted_scope_caveats.label: oeq:frontier
accepted_scope_caveats.caveat: Known smoothness indices, strict overlap, iid trajectories, and a fixed two-period horizon are treated as fixed-regime conditions.
accepted_scope_caveats.bound_claim: Any frontier claim is conditional on these fixed-index, strictly-overlapping two-period observational regimes; adaptation and longer horizons are excluded.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the fuzzy handle with two explicitly defined mixture laws, including a baseline H1 law, pi2 and untreated components, and perturbations whose signs do not cancel in psi; calculate both target separation and mixture Hellinger on a finite wavelet instance.

Define the sequential-HOIF estimating equation and the mixed cross-period remainder algebraically, then define Q as the set of order pairs satisfying an explicit o(n^{-r_1}+n^{-r_2}) remainder criterion under a stated ordering.

Add RobinsLiTchetgenVanderVaart2016 and KennedyBalakrishnanRobinsWasserman2024 to related work, explain precisely why neither subsumes the transition-composed rate, and correct the Gottesman citation metadata.

Ground exact state sufficiency and transition smoothness in one named longitudinal data-generating design with a pre-treatment state-construction protocol and explain why omitted-history dependence is negligible or excluded there.

recommended_next_step: Revise the lower-bound construction and correction-order target into well-defined mathematical objects, repair the missing close-literature comparison and assumption grounding, then re-review the resulting matched frontier.
